text:
is a social deduction game based on the Russian game ' It was published by via the EVANGELION STORE exclusive in late July 2021.

Overview

"Can you expose the Angel?"

Players: Minimum of 5 to maximum of 12 players + 1 Game Master to find the Angel disguised as a human while pretending to be an "Evangelion" character and having a conversation This is a communication game that you can play.

All players act as characters, but some of them are humanoid Angels who are plotting to undermine NERV employees. The players have to act according to the role that you are assigned. Find the Angel disguised as a human by making full use of the character's unique abilities!

There is açso included a bonus game called that can be played by at least 3 people in a short time and has simple rules. You can play normal Werewolf too. https://www.evastore.jp/shop/g/gA7084401/ 

Character cards: 13 cards
Position cards: 14 cards
Number of days cards: 6 card
Rules manual
Summary collection
Game Master script
Management table/line collection
